sentences.text: The social media ___ decides which posts appear at the top of your feed.
sentences.hint: A set of rules or steps followed by a computer to solve a problem

sentences.text: Unlike a simple website, a ___ allows other companies to build their own products and services on it.
sentences.hint: A system or service that other software or services are built on

sentences.text: Users complained that the new ___ had too many buttons and menus.
sentences.hint: The way a program looks and is arranged on screen for the user

sentences.text: The CTO warned that ___ would become a serious problem if they reached a million users without upgrading their servers.
sentences.hint: The ability of a system to handle growing amounts of work

sentences.text: Every time a user creates an account, their details are stored in a secure ___.
sentences.hint: An organized collection of data stored electronically
